{{Quote|Deltas, pay attention! You may only have one shot at this. You're looking at a dwarf spider droid, one of the Commerce Guild's nastiest anti-infantry units. Its durasteel plating is rated for starship hulls, and is nearly invulnerable to small arms fire. Only its optical cluster, the red orb on its abdomen, is unshielded and vulnerable.|[[01/425]]|<ref name="SWRC">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>}}
The '''A-DSD advanced dwarf spider droid''' was a more heavily armed and armored version of the [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droid]] and the [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|heavy dwarf spider droid]], capable of operating in complete darkness.

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|He's slower than a Gungan tree sloth!|RC-1207|<ref name="SWRC" />|audio=GunganTreeSloth.flac}}
[[File:Rex_A-DSD_TCWCG.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rex/Legends|Rex]] fires on an A-DSD.]]
According to [[Sev/Legends|Sev]], it was slower than a [[Gungan tree sloth]].<ref name="SWRC" />

==History==
Created by [[Commerce Guild Manufacturers]],<ref name="Prima" /> this droid was originally built to root out miners who refused to pay the trade conglomerate's tariffs. Available commercially for many years before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], it was used in holographic training simulators for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], but was not manufactured in large numbers until some time after the mobilization of the droid armies due to cost overruns.<ref name="TCWCG" />

==Appearances==
